name: io.github.BASIC-BIT/vrchat-mcp
title: VRChat MCP
description: MCP server for VRChat friends, worlds, groups, events, notifications, and VRCX history.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CONFIG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a JSON config file for settings not supplied through environment variables.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: VRChat API base URL override.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Descriptive User-Agent for VRChat API requests.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_SPEC_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAPI spec URL or file path override.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level for stderr diagnostics.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_COOKIE_STORE
environmentVariables.description: Cookie storage backend for VRChat authentication.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_COOKIE_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Cookie file path used when VRCHAT_MCP_COOKIE_STORE is file.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Enable non-GET VRChat API write operations.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_GROUP_ALLOWLIST
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated group IDs permitted for group write actions.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable in-memory caching for high-volume reads.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_TTL_FRIENDS
environmentVariables.description: Fresh cache TTL in seconds for friends data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_STALE_TTL_FRIENDS
environmentVariables.description: Stale cache TTL in seconds for friends data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_TTL_USER_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Fresh cache TTL in seconds for user group data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_STALE_TTL_USER_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Stale cache TTL in seconds for user group data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_TTL_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Fresh cache TTL in seconds for group data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_STALE_TTL_GROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Stale cache TTL in seconds for group data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_TTL_NOTIFICATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Fresh cache TTL in seconds for notification data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_CACHE_STALE_TTL_NOTIFICATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Stale cache TTL in seconds for notification data.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_PIPELINE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable the VRChat realtime pipeline websocket after login.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_PIPELINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: VRChat realtime pipeline websocket URL override.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_PIPELINE_RECONNECT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Realtime pipeline reconnect delay in milliseconds.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_PIPELINE_CHANGE_BUFFER
environmentVariables.description: Maximum in-memory friend change events retained.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_ENABLE_RAW_CALL
environmentVariables.description: Enable the low-level raw VRChat API call tool.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_DISABLE_GENERATED_READ_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Disable generated read tools from the VRChat OpenAPI spec.

environmentVariables.name: VRCHAT_MCP_DISABLE_GENERATED_WRITE_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Disable generated write tools from the VRChat OpenAPI spec.
